zh.lifeSummary: 當William Barker於1470年出生在英國時，他的父親Rev John Barker8歲，母親Joyce Coly Burton7歲。他於1517年與Dame Elizabeth Hill結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾聶德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Barker于1470年出生在英国时，他的父亲Rev John Barker8岁，母亲Joyce Coly Burton7岁。他于1517年与Dame Elizabeth Hill结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾聶德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Barker was born in 1470, in England, his father, Rev John Barker, was 8 and his mother, Joyce Coly Burton, was 7. He married Dame Elizabeth Hill in 1517. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He was buried in Knedlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Barker est né en 1470, à Angleterre, son père, Rev John Barker, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Joyce Coly Burton, avait 7 ans. Il a épousé Dame Elizabeth Hill en 1517. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Ilenterré à Knedlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Barker 1470 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rev John Barker 8 und seine Mutter Joyce Coly Burton 7. Er hat 1517 Dame Elizabeth Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er wurde in Knedlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Barker è nato il nel 1470 nel England, il suo padre, Rev John Barker, aveva 8 anni e il suo madre, Joyce Coly Burton, aveva 7 anni. Lui sposato Dame Elizabeth Hill nel 1517. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Fu sepolto a Knedlington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Barkerが1470年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Rev John Barkerは8歳，母Joyce Coly Burtonは7歳であった。1517年にDame Elizabeth Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアネドリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Barker(이)가 1470년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rev John Barker(은)는 8세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce Coly Burton(은)는 7세였다. 그는 1517년 Dame Elizabeth Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 네들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Barker nasceu em 1470, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Rev John Barker, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Coly Burton, tinha 7 anos. Ele casou-se com Dame Elizabeth Hill em 1517. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Knedlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Barker родился в 1470 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Rev John Barker было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce Coly Burton, 7. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Elizabeth Hill в 1517 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он был похоронен в местности недлингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Barker nació en 1470, en Inglaterra, su papá, Rev John Barker, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Joyce Coly Burton, tenía 7 años. Se casó con Dame Elizabeth Hill en 1517. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Fue sepultado en Knedlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
